display.purpose: Name, section headings, contact email — highest-weight moments only.

label.purpose: Hero role line, skill group labels, nav links, footer copyright.

body.purpose: Taglines, descriptions, list values, all running prose.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single filled action on the page: résumé download.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; background: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); color: var(--paper, #faf7f2); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: opacity 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover, .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { opacity: 0.8; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--accent, #a0764b); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Underline Link
components.description: Default interactive affordance for all secondary actions (social links, contact methods).
components.css: .ds-link { color: var(--soft, #6b6459); font-size: 0.875rem; text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: var(--line, #e5dfd4); text-underline-offset: 4px; transition: color 0.2s ease, text-decoration-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-link:hover, .ds-link:focus-visible { color: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); text-decoration-color: var(--accent, #a0764b); }

components.name: Section Heading
components.description: The system's only section marker: an accent em dash before a serif title, replacing eyebrow labels or numbering.
components.css: .ds-heading { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 1.875rem); letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); margin-bottom: 2.5rem; } .ds-heading-mark { color: var(--accent, #a0764b); margin-right: 0.75rem; }

components.name: Skills Row
components.description: Hairline-divided definition-list row used instead of a card grid for tag-like content.
components.html:
Languages
C# · TypeScript · SQL
components.css: .ds-skills-list { border-top: 1px solid var(--line, #e5dfd4); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line, #e5dfd4); } .ds-skills-row { display: grid; gap: 0.25rem; padding: 1rem 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--line, #e5dfd4); } .ds-skills-row:first-child { border-top: none; } .ds-skills-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--accent, #a0764b); font-family: 'Inter Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-skills-value { font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: var(--soft, #6b6459); }

components.name: Nav Bar
components.description: Sticky translucent header with backdrop blur and hairline bottom border.
components.html:
Hazem Lenin
  • About
  • Contact
components.css: .ds-nav { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line, #e5dfd4); background: color-mix(in oklab, var(--paper, #faf7f2) 80%, transparent); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 1rem 1.5rem; } .ds-nav-brand { font-family: 'Fraunces Variable', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 1.25rem; list-style: none; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--soft, #6b6459); } .ds-nav-links a { color: inherit; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-links a:hover, .ds-nav-links a:focus-visible { color: var(--ink, #1a1a1a); }

narrative.overview: This is a single page meant to be read, not scanned past. Warm paper tones, a serif display face, and hairline dividers give it the quiet confidence of a well-set personal essay rather than a marketing site. Nothing here is trying to convert a visitor with urgency; it's trying to earn attention through precision — tight type, deliberate spacing, one accent color used sparingly as a signature rather than a decoration. The system explicitly rejects the generic AI-portfolio template: no gradient text, no uppercase eyebrow labels stacked above every section, no numbered 01/02/03 scaffolding, no icon-card grids, no hero-metric stat blocks. Sections are separated by hairline rules and generous vertical rhythm, not by cards or boxed containers. Depth comes from color and line weight, never from shadow.
keyCharacteristics: Warm paper background in light mode, warm near-black in dark mode — never pure white or pure black
Fraunces serif for display moments only (name, section titles, email); Inter for everything functional
One accent color (warm terracotta-tan) used only for labels, dividers, and hover states — never for large surfaces
Fully flat: no shadows, no elevation, no glass
A single em-dash (—) as the section marker, replacing eyebrow labels or numbering

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Terracotta-tan appears only on labels, marks, underlines, and hover states — never as a fill on any element larger than an icon or a few words of text.

rules.name: The Warm-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Every neutral (paper, ink, soft, line) shares the same warm hue lean in both light and dark mode. Never introduce a cool gray.

rules.name: The Serif-Only-For-Weight Rule
rules.body: Fraunces is reserved for name, section titles, and the contact email. Inter carries body copy, labels, and navigation.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Never add box-shadow to any component. Depth comes from hairline borders and background-color shifts only.

dos: Do keep every neutral warm-hued (paper, ink, soft, line) in both light and dark mode
Do use the accent color sparingly: labels, marks, underline hovers, selection color
Do use hairline borders and background contrast for all separation and depth
Do reserve Fraunces serif for name, section headings, and the contact email
Do default to underlined text links for secondary actions; reserve the filled pill button for the one primary action
donts: Don't add box-shadows, glassmorphism, or any glow/elevation effect
Don't add uppercase tracked eyebrow labels or numbered section markers (01/02/03)
Don't build icon+heading+text card grids for skills, projects, or experience
Don't introduce a cream/sand/beige tint beyond the already-committed paper tone
Don't pair Fraunces with any other serif, or Inter with any other geometric/humanist sans
